name: White Pine Wholesale
description_short: Online diamond and jewelry buyer specializing in recycled, estate, and certified diamonds with direct-to-consumer sales and buyback options.
description_long:
White Pine Wholesale operates as an online diamond and jewelry marketplace focused on the secondary market for diamonds and fine jewelry. The company positions itself as a buyer and seller of recycled melee diamonds, estate jewelry, and GIA-certified stones, operating through a direct e-commerce platform rather than a traditional brick-and-mortar pawn shop location. Their business model centers on acquiring used diamonds and jewelry from consumers and reselling curated inventory to new buyers seeking certified or recycled stones.

The company offers several core services including the ability to sell diamonds and jewelry directly to them, browse and purchase certified stones and finished jewelry pieces, and access to GIA-certified inventory. Their product categories include natural melee diamonds, lab-grown melee diamonds, estate jewelry, custom diamond basics, and finished jewelry in various metals (14K gold, 18K gold, platinum). They maintain a curated selection of branded pieces, including designer jewelry from houses like Cartier and Tiffany. The site advertises a "Sell Directly to Us" service and provides product previews and market news to subscribers.

White Pine Wholesale distinguishes itself through its focus on the ethical and sustainability angle of recycled diamonds, marketing them as alternatives to newly mined stones. They provide educational content on topics like ethically sourced diamonds, successful jewelry sales strategies, and the quality of recycled diamonds. Their GIA certification offering and detailed product grading information reflect a professional approach to the secondary diamond market. The company operates with defined business hours (weekdays 9 AM - 5:30 PM EST) and a direct phone line, suggesting a hybrid online-and-service model.

As a specialty diamond and jewelry buyer-reseller, White Pine Wholesale caters to a niche market rather than general pawn shop customers. However, the core transaction—buying personal jewelry and diamonds from consumers and reselling them—aligns with pawn shop operations. The company's strength lies in expertise and online convenience, but consumers should note this is not a quick-cash or emergency lending service, and valuations for used jewelry can vary significantly based on market conditions and actual stone quality.
address: 2 W 45th St STE 1705, New York, NY 10036

company_info.headquarters: 2 W 45th St STE 1705, New York, NY 10036

pros: GIA-certified diamond inventory with detailed grading information provided on product listings
Direct buyback service allowing consumers to sell jewelry and diamonds without intermediaries
Educational content on diamond quality, ethical sourcing, and jewelry sales strategies
Specialization in recycled and estate diamonds, appealing to sustainability-conscious buyers
Established online platform with designer inventory (Cartier, Tiffany pieces documented)
New customer discount (30% off with code "NEW30") for first-time buyers
Clear business hours and direct phone support during weekday business hours
cons: Online-only model with no physical locations, limiting in-person evaluation of items before selling
No transparent information about buyback pricing formulas or valuation methodology on the website
Limited visibility into typical turnaround time for selling jewelry or receiving payment
Jewelry valuations highly dependent on market conditions and GIA certification, potentially resulting in lower offers than expected for non-certified pieces
No information about storage, insurance, or liability if items are damaged during the selling process
best_for: Consumers with certified diamonds or high-end estate jewelry looking to liquidate without local pawn shops
Buyers seeking ethically sourced or recycled diamonds for engagement rings or fine jewelry
People interested in designer pieces (Cartier, Tiffany) at secondary market prices
Individuals wanting educational resources on diamond quality and jewelry authenticity before buying
diagnosis: White Pine Wholesale is best for consumers who have diamonds or fine jewelry to sell and prefer working with a specialized, online-focused buyer over traditional local pawn shops, as well as buyers seeking certified recycled diamonds. The main caveat is that valuations depend entirely on GIA certification and current market conditions—uncertified jewelry or pieces below a certain quality threshold may receive significantly lower offers than sentimental value suggests.
services: Buy diamonds and jewelry directly from consumers
Purchase and resale of estate jewelry
Finished diamond jewelry sales (earrings, necklaces, bracelets, rings)
Custom diamond setting basics and guidance
Designer jewelry resale (Cartier, Tiffany, and others)
Email newsletter subscription for market news and product previews
Detailed product grading and certification information
